optionName: Nvidia GeForce RTX 2080 Super Founders Edition
detailedDescription:
A refined 2080 with higher clocks and more memory bandwidth.
Pushes solidly into 4K territory with excellent ray tracing performance.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: TU104 | Architecture: Turing
CUDA Cores: 3072 | RT Cores: 48 | Tensor Cores: 384
VRAM: 8GB GDDR6 (256-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 496 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4, 1x HDMI 2.0, 1x USB-C (VirtualLink)
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 3.0)
Recommended PSU: 650W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
